query: Kamala Harris memoir title published September 23 2025
a_issues: All results confirm the title '107 Days' and Sept 23 publication date via Wikipedia, KCRA, NBC News, and National Desk articles; no factual errors, but slightly less direct confirmation of the exact Sept 23 release date from an authoritative primary source (NPR/AP confirming publication day itself is missing).
b_issues: No significant factual flaws; NPR article confirms book 'out Tuesday' (Sept 23, 2025 was a Tuesday), AP News and Wikipedia confirm title and publisher/date, and the official book site confirms title and bestseller status.
reasoning: Both sets correctly and consistently identify the memoir as '107 Days' by Kamala Harris, published by Simon & Schuster on September 23, 2025. Content B has a slight edge because it includes the NPR article explicitly stating the book is 'out Tuesday' (matching Sept 23, 2025, a Tuesday) and the official 107daysbook.com site, providing more direct, corroborating confirmation of the exact release date alongside AP News and Wikipedia. Content A is also accurate and sufficient, but B's sourcing is marginally more robust and directly tied to the publication date.
